holdings.infoBox: AADR is an equity ETF with a total of 36 individual holdings. The top holdings are Embraer stock at 4.83%, Banco Bilbao Vizcaya Argentaria at 4.66%, China Yuchai International at 4.63%, Mitsubishi UFJ Financial Group at 4.48%, and Compañía de Minas Buenaventura at 4.11%.

overview.description: The AdvisorShares Dorsey Wright ADR ETF (AADR) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund is an actively managed ETF that aims to outperform the international markets outside the US by holding ADRs with high relative strength. AADR was launched on Jul 20, 2010 and is issued by AdvisorShares.
